My heart is broken over the passing of my friend and neighbor Ed McClure. Prayers for Kathy and the family as they grieve over their loss. Rogers is a great place to live, thanks to pillars like Ed! Rest in peace my friend.

Banning the desecration of our national flag is a decision that should be left to the American people and their elected representatives. In my latest op-ed, I explain why protecting our flag matters—and why Congress should have the authority to act. Read more:

Today is Flag Day. Today, we honor and celebrate the Stars and Stripes—our nation’s most sacred symbol, woven into every chapter of our history and reflecting the American mosaic.
 
Yet Congress has no constitutional authority to protect it from desecration.
